description.ko: 암흑 물질과 별빛의 중력적 춤에 초점을 맞춘, 우주적 규모의 장엄한 표현입니다.
description.en: A majestic representation of cosmic scale, focusing on the gravitational dance of dark matter and starlight.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Abyssal Crown.' A massive planetary ring composed of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter and gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust, creating a lens-warping gravitational lensing effect. Atmosphere of infinite scale and silent majesty, with volumetric lighting and hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic. Capturing the divine and terrifying beauty of the deep universe.
